PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $_ \($\(\(Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on port 4200" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "Still in use by PID\(s\): $\($c.OwningProcess -join ', '\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 4200 is now free." })
